DP PipelineOps Weekly Data pipelines, AIOps, anomaly detection
Subscribe

Weekly field notes for data and AI reliability teams

PipelineOps Weekly

PipelineOps Weekly covers data pipeline reliability, AIOps, ML anomaly detection, data observability, machine learning monitoring, and production ML systems for engineering teams operating data and AI platforms.

Editorial Promise

  • 01Original essays on data pipeline reliability, operational failure modes, and practical ML systems.
  • 02Curated signals from engineering blogs, observability releases, incidents, and open-source data tools.
  • 03Research notes translated into implementation tradeoffs for ML anomaly detection and AIOps.

Coverage

data pipeline reliability AI operations newsletter AIOps ML anomaly detection machine learning monitoring data observability data quality monitoring pipeline monitoring
A Original Field Notes C AIOps & Observability E Research to Production
A

Original Field Notes

Hand-written essays, implementation notes, and opinions from the publication team.

Original Essay #1 Original 2026-07-04

What Makes a Data Pipeline Worth Monitoring?

Use this file for hand-written pieces from you and guest contributors. Each item can be a short essay, an implementation note, a design critique, or a field report from operating data and AI systems in production.

Suggested angle for the first issue: define the newsletter's core thesis around data reliability, AI-assisted operations, and anomaly detection. Explain which pipeline failures deserve ML, which deserve deterministic checks, and where human review still belongs.
